name: manmade2-belialdb
documentation:
# belial db

[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/belial-db.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/belial-db)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/belial-db.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/belial-db)

-----

## Table of Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [License](#license)

## Installation

```console
pip install belial-db
```

## License

`belial-db` is distributed under the terms of the [MIT](https://spdx.org/licenses/MIT.html) license.

classes.name: belial_db.models.map.Map
documentation:
Represents a map in the database.

Attributes:
    Id (int): The primary key for the map.
    Name (str): The name of the map.
    Assets (list[AssetModel]): A list of assets associated with the map.
    AssetFiles (list[AssetFileModel]): A list of asset files associated with the map.

classes.name: belial_db.models.vector4_type.Vector4Type

methods.name: belial_db.models.vector4_type.Vector4Type.process_bind_param
documentation:
Convert a Vector4 object to a JSON string for storage in the database.

Args:
    value (Any): The value to be bound to the database.
    dialect (Any): The dialect in use.

Returns:
    str | None: A JSON string representation of the Vector4 object, or None.

methods.name: belial_db.models.vector4_type.Vector4Type.process_result_value
documentation:
Convert a JSON string from the database back to a Vector4 object.

Args:
    value (str | None): The value retrieved from the database.
    dialect (Dialect): The dialect in use.

Returns:
    Vector4 | None: A Vector4 object created from the JSON string, or None.
Custom SQLAlchemy type for storing Vector4 objects as JSON strings.

classes.name: belial_db.models.asset.Asset
documentation:
Represents an asset in the game.

Attributes:
    Id (int): The primary key for the asset.
    AssetFileId (int): The ID of the associated asset file.
    Path (str): The file path of the asset.
    Type (str): The type of the asset (e.g., model, texture).
    ScaleFactor (float): The scale factor for the asset.
    Position (Vector3Type): The 3D position of the asset in the game world.
    Rotation (Vector4Type): The rotation of the asset represented as a quaternion.
    MapId (int): The ID of the map where the asset is located.
    Map (MapModel): The map model associated with this asset.

modules.name: belial_db.models.relationships
documentation:
This module defines the relationships between different database models
using SQLAlchemy. It includes associations for maps, assets, and asset files.

classes.name: belial_db.models.vector3_type.Vector3Type

methods.name: belial_db.models.vector3_type.Vector3Type.process_bind_param
documentation:
Convert a Vector3 object to a JSON string for storage in the database.

Args:
    value (Any): The value to be bound to the database.
    dialect (Any): The dialect in use.

Returns:
    str | None: A JSON string representation of the Vector3 object, or the original value if not a Vector3.

methods.name: belial_db.models.vector3_type.Vector3Type.process_result_value
documentation:
Convert a JSON string from the database back to a Vector3 object.

Args:
    value (str | None): The value retrieved from the database.
    dialect (Dialect): The dialect in use.

Returns:
    Vector3 | None: A Vector3 object created from the JSON string, or None if the value is None.
Custom SQLAlchemy type for handling Vector3 objects.

classes.name: belial_db.models.asset_file.AssetFile
documentation:
Represents an asset file in the database.

Attributes:
    Id (int): The primary key for the asset file.
    Path (str): The file path of the asset.
    Type (str): The type of the asset.
    DoodadSetIndex (int): The index of the doodad set.
    DoodadSetNames (str): The names of the doodad sets.
    MapId (int): The foreign key referencing the associated map.
    Map (Mapped[MapModel]): The relationship to the MapModel.

classes.name: belial_db.data.vector3.Vector3
documentation:
A class to represent a 3D vector.

Attributes:
    x (float): The x-coordinate of the vector.
    y (float): The y-coordinate of the vector.
    z (float): The z-coordinate of the vector.

classes.name: belial_db.data.vector4.Vector4
documentation:
A class representing a 4-dimensional vector.

Attributes:
    x (float): The x-coordinate of the vector.
    y (float): The y-coordinate of the vector.
    z (float): The z-coordinate of the vector.
    w (float): The w-coordinate of the vector.

functions.name: belial_db.create_connection
documentation:
Create a database connection and initialize the database schema.

Args:
    db_url (str): The database URL to connect to.
    echo (bool): If True, the engine will log all statements. Default is False.

Returns:
    Engine: A SQLAlchemy Engine instance connected to the specified database.

methods.name: belial_db.repos.mapRepo.MapRepo.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the MapRepo with a SQLAlchemy engine.

Args:
    engine (Engine): The SQLAlchemy engine to connect to the database.

methods.name: belial_db.repos.mapRepo.MapRepo.get_map
documentation:
Retrieve a map by its ID.

Args:
    id (int): The ID of the map to retrieve.

Returns:
    MapModel | None: The map model if found, otherwise None.

methods.name: belial_db.repos.mapRepo.MapRepo.create_map
documentation:
Create a new map in the database.

Args:
    map (MapModel): The map model to create.

Returns:
    MapModel: The created map model.

methods.name: belial_db.repos.mapRepo.MapRepo.update_map
documentation:
Update an existing map in the database.

Args:
    map (MapModel): The map model to update.

Returns:
    MapModel: The updated map model.

methods.name: belial_db.repos.mapRepo.MapRepo.delete_map
documentation:
Delete a map from the database by its ID.

Args:
    id (int): The ID of the map to delete.
